episodes.title: The Epstein Files Reveal Links to Israel’s Political Elite | Covert Connections
episodes.description:
What do the Jeffrey Epstein files reveal about his connections to Israel?

This episode of Covert Connections examines Epstein’s documented relationship with former Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Barak, from financial dealings and defence tech discussions, to visits to Epstein’s private island and the presence of Israeli state security inside a Manhattan property linked to Epstein.

Drawing directly from publicly released documents, emails, and reporting, this video explores:

Epstein’s role as a financial adviser and intermediary
His links to Israeli political and business networks
Documented interactions involving Israeli security personnel
References to former intelligence operatives and Mossad

None of the material presented proves that Epstein worked for Israeli intelligence.
But taken together, the files show how he maintained access to powerful figures across Israel’s political, financial, and security spheres.

#EpsteinFiles #Epstein #israel #Mossad

episodes.title: Was Jeffrey Epstein working for the KGB? | Covert Connections
episodes.description:
A report in the Daily Mail quoted intelligence sources claiming that Jeffrey Epstein was running a KGB Honeytrap operation. What's the truth behind this extraordinary suggestion and what evidence is to be found in the millions of documents in the Epstein Files? We go through all the key connections Epstein made with Russian businessmen, Kremlin insiders and politicians, including his numerous attempts to contact Vladimir Putin. We also explore claims that there were attempts to use the Russian intelligence tactic of obtaining 'kompromat' on businessmen and political figures.

Let us know what connections you want us to explore in the comments below!

#EpsteinFiles #Epstein #KGB #Putin
